indications_and_usage: Do not begin use of any hydrocortisone product unless you've asked a doctor. Do not use in the genital area if you have a vaginal discharge. Consult a doctor. Do not use more than directed unless told to do so by a doctor.
dosage_and_administration: Uses Temporarily relieves itching associated with minor skin irritations, inflammation and rashes due to: eczema, psoriasis, insect bites, detergents, jewelry, cosmetics, soaps, seborrheic dermatitis and more.
Directions Apply to affected area not more than 3 to 4 times daily. Children under 2 years, do not use; ask a doctor.
